C[kijknietlinks: hey, lets begin and enjoy a great game :D
C[Mahiraku: I hate when people play the top themselves and don't play normally ><
C[Mahiraku: The sides, not the top vs bottom
C[kijknietlinks: lol, its pretty much the same but i guess it makes a difference to how u look at the game
C[Mahiraku: Severely, because now my strategy is shot.
C[Mahiraku: I had a plan based on the sides, now that's gone.
kijknietlinks: the board is a square
Mahiraku: Not the way I look at the board.
C[Mahiraku: It's longer from the sides, not the bottom.
C[kijknietlinks: without wanting to sound like a smartass, that might explain something
kijknietlinks: while u are not wrong that its more advantageous for me to take the fight to ur territory ( which is what i did) its also wrong to enter a game with an established gameplan
kijknietlinks: its a very situational game
kijknietlinks: and if ur not willing to be flexible with what u want, ull get cornered
C[kijknietlinks: to be honest what i thought was a great move already on ur part is not taking doubt 4-4
Mahiraku: Ah, I see. Which move was that again?
kijknietlinks: at move 4 u took one closer to the edge, thats great
kijknietlinks: because that way u take a corner
kijknietlinks: the 4-4 i could invade with a 3-3
kijknietlinks: but since we both have 1 the same threat is for both of us
kijknietlinks: tenuki with sente for u
C[Mahiraku: don't know what tenuki means :P
C[kijknietlinks: tenuki is when u play elsewhere on the board from where we were previously fighting
kijknietlinks: usually at a moment where u kno ur gonna be at a disadvantage in the game at that moment
kijknietlinks: or when ur opponents threat isnt big enough
kijknietlinks: or in this case, when the board is still hugely empty
C[kijknietlinks: yeah no, i look at this and u def kno what ur doing
kijknietlinks: i dont see u sacrifice stones unnecessarily
kijknietlinks: u dun usually move away at any crucial moments
kijknietlinks: maybe u spend too much time on one area when there is still much space left, but i wouldnt say ur reasoning is bad
C[kijknietlinks: another thing, when u have sente
kijknietlinks: sometimes u can do a move u dun want to do, so u can still do the move u wanted
C[kijknietlinks: like when u went for my corner
kijknietlinks: i saw we were heading to middle
kijknietlinks: so i needed to connect my stones
kijknietlinks: so i needed to move back down for a few moves
kijknietlinks: so i could come back up
C[kijknietlinks: sorry, just checking if d3 was safe or not
C[kijknietlinks: i took a step back first so that i could cover h16
kijknietlinks: and make a ladder on the other side
C[kijknietlinks: i also occasionally take moves away from regular play around the edge closing phase
C[kijknietlinks: cuz the long run is more important to me than the short run
C[kijknietlinks: if i were u id protect the middle indeed
Mahiraku: Then that was a good move?
kijknietlinks: it wasnt bad, im not sure it was the most urgent, but since uve taken a turn for defence i can do the same
kijknietlinks: prolly covering the corner so that i cant 3-3 invade is the most important
Mahiraku: I just see little space I can invade in at this point.
C[kijknietlinks: i could prolly attempt an invasion at c10, c9 or c8
kijknietlinks: but i dunno, ders not much space up or sideways
kijknietlinks: so i prolly best not try
kijknietlinks: im alright with pincers when the board is empty
kijknietlinks: but i dislike local fighting too much
kijknietlinks: we can go into a review if u want
Mahiraku: I wanna know how I lost by almost 20 :P
Mahiraku: I pushed inward big time!
kijknietlinks: i think its that i took sente away from u in that fight
kijknietlinks: who ever has sente usually shapes the board
kijknietlinks: since the other is responding to him/her
